title: Provider and Tool Errors, Retry Eligibility, Idempotency, Compensation, and Stop · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in typed idempotent agent recovery policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Classify validation, safety, authentication, authorization, quota, rate, transient provider, terminal provider, tool, policy, timeout, cancellation, and uncertain-effect failures.
Retry only idempotent or protected operations when policy, deadline, budget, status, provider guidance, and attempt evidence permit.
Apply bounded delay, Retry-After, jitter, global and per-resource concurrency, rate, token, and spend budgets without retry storms.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-compensation-stop-1nen27
# Competency: agentpy-compensation-stop.
# Case 1958: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_compensation_stop_1nen27(failures: int = 18, retryable_failures: int = 8, terminal_failures: int = 10, successful_retries: int = 7, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1nen27 = "1nen27-72nen1-1958"
    assert evidence_variant_1nen27
    evidence_axes_1nen27 = (
        "authority1nen27",
        "interaction1958",
        "tool72nen1",
        "state1nen271958",
        "evaluation19581nen27",
        "recovery72nen11958",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1nen27)) == 6
    if failures < 1 or retryable_failures < 0 or terminal_failures < 0:
        return False, failures, "failure-count"
    if retryable_failures + terminal_failures != failures:
        return False, retryable_failures, "failure-classification"
    if successful_retries < 0 or successful_retries > retryable_failures:
        return False, successful_retries, "retry-evidence"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "retry-duplicate-effect"
    assert retryable_failures + terminal_failures == failures and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, successful_retries, "idempotent-agent-recovery"
